channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Hawaii turns ocean plastic and fishing nets into road materials
item.description: Researchers in Hawaii are recycling old fishing nets and plastic into asphalt. Early tests show these roads perform well.

item.title: Yellowstone supervolcano may be fueled by unexpected source
item.description: Scientists have found a new explanation for Yellowstone's power, suggesting it may not come from a deep mantle plume.

item.title: James Webb telescope reveals exotic salt clouds on a mysterious pink world
item.description: Astronomers have solved the mystery of the 'Pink Planet,' a strange world 57 light-years away that has puzzled scientists for years.

item.title: Common pesticide linked to more than double the risk of Parkinson's disease
item.description: UCLA scientists have linked long-term exposure to the pesticide chlorpyrifos with a sharply increased risk of Parkinson's disease.
